mandatory_clauses.description: Full names and addresses of both employer and employee
Country (or countries) where the assignment takes place
Start and end date of the international assignment
Confirmation that the home-country employment contract remains in force
Gross salary during the assignment and any cost-of-living adjustments
Relocation cost reimbursement (moving costs, housing, travel)
Applicable law governing the assignment agreement
Tax equalization or protection policy during the assignment
Terms for return to the home country role after the assignment ends
